## What This Changes

Describe what you changed and which files are affected.

## Why

What motivated this change? Reference an issue if applicable.

## Type

- [ ] New team contribution
- [ ] Improvement to existing team
- [ ] Framework change (meta-agent pattern, auditor, constitution, feedback loop)
- [ ] Domain constitution addition/improvement
- [ ] Portable prompt improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## For Team Contributions

- [ ] All required files present (README, constitution, glossary, meta-agent, auditor, agents, feedback template, baseline scores)
- [ ] Constitution includes domain-specific ethical and regulatory constraints
- [ ] Agent prompts have concrete, measurable output standards
- [ ] Agent dependencies are consistent (every referenced agent exists)
- [ ] Tested through at least 2-3 feedback cycles (or clearly labeled as draft)

## For Framework Changes

- [ ] Documented rationale for why the change improves the system
- [ ] Checked for side effects on existing teams
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation

## For Safety-Related Changes

- [ ] Constraints are strengthened, not weakened
- [ ] Regulatory references are current and accurate
- [ ] Tested against adversarial prompts where applicable

## Side Effects

What could this break? What should reviewers watch for?
